user.title: Connect your Rebrama account
user.description: Sign in with the phone number and password you use in the Rebrama mobile app. The account must already be registered in the app.

data_description.phone: Include the country code, for example 380XXXXXXXXX. The leading '+' is optional.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Rebrama
reauth_confirm.description: The stored credentials for {phone} are no longer valid. Enter the password again.

reconfigure.title: Update Rebrama credentials
reconfigure.description: Update the phone number and/or password for this account. It must remain the same Rebrama account.

data_description.phone: Include the country code, for example 380XXXXXXXXX. The leading '+' is optional.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Rebrama. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_phone: Enter a valid phone number including the country code.
error.account_not_found: No Rebrama account exists for this phone number. Create one in the Rebrama app first.

abort.already_configured: This Rebrama account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The credentials are for a different Rebrama account than the one configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to refresh access points. Leave empty to use the interval recommended by the Rebrama server.

auth_failed.message: Authentication with Rebrama failed. Please re-authenticate the integration.

open_failed.message: Could not open the access point: {error}

open_not_delivered.message: The open command could not be delivered to the device. It may be offline.

entry_not_found.message: The selected Rebrama account could not be found.

entry_not_loaded.message: The selected Rebrama account is not loaded.

invalid_access_point.message: {entity_id} is not a Rebrama access point.

single_account_required.message: All selected access points must belong to the same Rebrama account.

invalid_time_range.message: The end time must be after the start time.

create_temporary_access.name: Create temporary access
create_temporary_access.description: Creates a time-limited share link for one or more access points.

access_points.name: Access points
access_points.description: The access point 'open' buttons to grant temporary access to.

start.name: Start
start.description: When the temporary access becomes valid.

description.name: Description
description.description: A label shown for this temporary access.

uses.name: Maximum uses
uses.description: Optional limit on how many times the link can be used.

delete_temporary_access.name: Delete temporary access
delete_temporary_access.description: Deletes a previously created temporary access link.

config_entry_id.name: Account
config_entry_id.description: The Rebrama account the temporary access belongs to.

link.name: Link or slug
link.description: The share URL or its trailing slug to delete.
